name: CLX - MGA Insurance Carrier Appointment Create v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. mga_principal session. Records a per-advisor carrier appointment with commission splits (advisor + MGA + carrier %). Validates splits sum to 100. Updates advisor_onboarding.carrier_appointments_initiated.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', mga_principal_id: $json.mga_principal_id, advisor_id: $json.advisor_id, carrier_name: $json.carrier_name, carrier_appointment_number: $json.carrier_appointment_number, product_lines: $json.product_lines, effective_date: $json.effective_date, expires_date: $json.expires_date, commission_split_carrier: $json.commission_split_carrier, commission_split_mga: $json.commission_split_mga, commission_split_advisor: $json.commission_split_advisor, status: 'active', documentation_url: $json.documentation_url }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'carrier_appointment_created', advisor_id: $('Check Role').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Check Role').item.json.mga_principal_id, performed_by_role: 'mga_principal', event_data: { carrier_name: $('Check Role').item.json.carrier_name, splits: { carrier: $('Check Role').item.json.commission_split_carrier, mga: $('Check Role').item.json.commission_split_mga, advisor: $('Check Role').item.json.commission_split_advisor } }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Appointment').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', appointment_id: row && row.id, carrier_name: row && row.carrier_name }); })() }}
